playbook.intent: 30-min Friday ritual to AR follow-up list + utilization heat map + go/no-go on next contractor hire.
playbook.scope: Founder reviews cash position, AR, AP, contractor utilization. Output: AR follow-up list + utilization heat map + go/no-go on next contractor hire. Exit artifact: cash + utilization summary doc, AR follow-ups sent, hire decision noted.

success-criteria.criterion: AR follow-up list with owners + dates
Hire / no-hire decision logged for the week

stage.name: Cash + AR/AP
stage.intent: Cash truth + chase overdue invoices same day.

tasks.task: Send AR follow-ups for items overdue more than 30 days

stage.decision-gate: Advance once AR follow-ups sent for every overdue invoice.

stage.name: Utilization heat map
stage.decision-gate: Advance once heat map covers every active contractor.

stage.name: Hire / no-hire
stage.intent: Use cash + utilization signal to decide on next hire.

tasks.task: Apply hire decision rule to data

stage.decision-gate: Required output: written go/no-go for next contractor hire.

extra.value: [Monthly book close - separate ritual, Annual financial planning - separate playbook]
[Bookkeeping + invoicing system live, Contractor + project utilization data captured weekly]
[Skipping AR chase because 'they will pay' - DSO creep kills cash, 'Hiring on revenue spikes, not on sustained utilization', Reading utilization as 'busy' rather than 'billable']
['Did I chase every overdue invoice, no exceptions?', 'Is the utilization number billable, not just hours worked?', 'Did I write the hire decision down?']

{human: faion get-content friday-cash-flow-and-utilization-check --format md, agent: faion get-content friday-cash-flow-and-utilization-check --format context, json: faion get-content friday-cash-flow-and-utilization-check --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for F-064 P5 micro-agency founder persona}]
